_meta.description: Structured reasoning scaffolds for finance analysis workflows.

scaffolds.name: Valuation and Ratio Scaffold
steps: Identify metric family and accounting basis
Resolve period and currency context
Locate numerator and denominator from table headers
Run formula with explicit units
Cross-check against peers or historical bands
Output interpretation with confidence and caveats

scaffolds.name: Variance and Trend Scaffold
steps: Extract comparable periods with same table header
Align units and scale
Compute abs + pct variance
Flag materiality threshold and drivers
Link drivers to disclosures
Provide concise recommendation

scaffolds.name: Covenant Validation Scaffold
steps: Read covenant clause and exact threshold
Collect source metrics and formulas
Harmonize period and basis
Compute test value
Determine pass/fail/warning
Report cure or waiver language if present

scaffolds.name: Cash Management Scaffold
steps: Identify period buckets and liquidity class
Capture opening cash and net change inputs
Reconcile by table sections
Check non-cash and FX effects
Compute runway or remaining runway
Explain risks of concentration

scaffolds.name: Budget Integrity Scaffold
steps: Map budget and actual line items
Ensure same denominator units
Recalculate variances line-by-line
Sum by section to validate totals
Check commentary consistency
Produce exception list for high variance items

scaffolds.name: Cap Table Scaffold
steps: Identify holders and classes
Normalize share counts and options
Apply dilution from warrants/options
Calculate fully diluted basis
Compare by stakeholder
Validate against preferred terms

scaffolds.name: Extended Finance Scaffold 1
steps: Collect relevant 1 finance signal from statements
Confirm table/header context and period
Normalize currency and unit
Cross-check with alternate source if available
Provide concise insight with residual uncertainty

scaffolds.name: Growth and Portfolio Scaffold 1
steps: Load growth signal #1 from finance tables
Validate table header context with period and unit
Normalize to same currency and granularity
Compute trend and volatility band
Attach disclosure context and confidence
Emit concise decision-ready summary
